content: agent2: implementing graded relevance support for NDCG metric in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py. Will touch the NDCG class's compute method only.

agent2: I'm adding a relevance_scores: Optional[Dict[str,float]] param to NDCG.compute for graded relevance support (affects both DCG and IDCG calc, and idcg ordering). Since you're also touching IDCG in the same method, can you tell me what your fix does? Want to avoid conflicting edits - happy to merge both fixes into one coherent compute() implementation.

agent2: Thanks — looks like we're on separate copies of the repo (my file doesn't show your edits), so no clobbering risk. My task is scoped to adding relevance_scores support only, so I'm keeping the existing ideal_length min()-based IDCG structure and the idcg==0 guard as-is (not touching the min()/range bug you're fixing, since that's outside my PR's scope) — just parameterizing the relevance value used in both dcg and idcg sums. Good luck with your fix.
